2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

11 Myles Kirby

  • Position G
  • Height 6-1
  • Weight 175
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Atlanta, Ga.
  • High School IMG Academy
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

BEFORE SAINT ANSELM: Played basketball for IMG Academy at high school and post-grad levels.

PERSONAL: Son of Collins and Tanneshia...brother of Evan...Business major at Saint A's...drawn to Saint A's by the great coaching staff and academics...favorite athlete is LeBron James.
